title: Summarize Academic Lecture
scenario: Summarize an academic lecture (approximately 1,000-1,500 words) into a 4-5 bullet-point summary. The summary should capture the main points, including key concepts, theories, and findings. Assume the reader has basic knowledge of the subject matter. The summary should be concise and focused on the most important information.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated summary is in bullet-point format and does not exceed 150 words.
Verify that the summary captures the key concepts and theories presented in the lecture.
Evaluate the accuracy of the findings summary, ensuring it is correct and relevant.
Assess the readability of the summary, considering factors such as grammar, spelling, and formatting.
